mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_fee_item WHERE deleted = 0
AND (fee_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, fee_code, name, category, price, unit, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_fee_item WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_fee_item (fee_code, name, category, price, unit, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{feeCode}, #{name}, #{category}, #{price}, #{unit}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_fee_item
fee_code = #{feeCode}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, unit = #{unit}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
